title: Caremore Corner Brackets Stainless Steel L Brackets, , 20-Pack, Heavy Duty Corner Braces for Furniture and Shelving(40mm*40mm*40mm
features: DIMENSIONS: Precision-crafted L-shaped brackets, made from durable stainless steel for lasting strength and stability
PACKAGE CONTENTS: Set of 20 corner brackets, each featuring pre-drilled holes for easy mounting and installation
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Perfect for reinforcing wooden furniture, shelving units, bed frames, bookcases, and various DIY projects
CONSTRUCTION: Heavy-duty 90-degree angle design ensures reliable support and structural integrity for your installations
PREMIUM FINISH: Brushed stainless steel construction offers excellent corrosion resistance and a professional, modern appearance
description: Enhance the structural integrity of your furniture and shelving projects with these premium stainless steel angle brackets. Each pack includes 20 robust L-shaped brackets, measuring 40mm x 40mm x 40mm, perfect for heavy-duty applications. The brushed stainless steel construction offers excellent durability and a professional finish that complements modern décor. These versatile 90-degree corner braces are ideal for securing wooden frames, beds, furniture, and bookshelves. Each bracket features pre-drilled holes for easy installation and precise alignment. The substantial thickness provides reliable support for your mounting needs, while the clean, industrial aesthetic maintains a professional appearance. These brackets excel in both functional and decorative applications, offering the perfect solution for DIY enthusiasts and professional craftspeople alike. The corrosion-resistant properties of stainless steel ensure long-lasting performance in various environments.
